_readme: v1 (pre-cutover) input records for scripts/migrate-to-v2.mjs, used by test/migrate-v2-replay.test.mjs. Per package: the data files as they stood at <cutover>^, sampled — K evenly spaced indices plus the first ungeocoded record, deduplicated, original order kept. `_cutover` is the commit that migrated that package, so `git show <sha>^:packages/<pkg>/data/<file>` reproduces the full v1 input.

_sample.rule: evenly spaced indices over the v1 array + first record with no lat/lng
